framework.name: Multi-Agent Specialist Network Architecture
framework.description: Enterprise value emerges from networks of specialized agents (data analysis, pattern recognition, domain knowledge) collaborating on complex workflows rather than single-purpose agents. Creates reusable analytical frameworks and institutional knowledge.
framework.raw_quote: For example, in a consumer goods company, one agent might analyze sales data, another optimize supply chain operations and a third track market trends. Together, they can identify emerging opportunities and risks, generate actionable recommendations, automate complex business processes and create reusable analytical frameworks.
